summary: Adjusted the opening to avoid repeating Chapter 3's forecasted morning routine and added a brief after-supper bridge into Venn's Chapter 5 knowledge state.
edits: Reframed the opening around Suna waking on the damp mat instead of a broad 'fifth morning' summary already anticipated in Chapter 3.
Added a short after-supper beat showing Mava speaking quietly to Venn so Chapter 5's opening lands as a direct continuation.
